Interface BayesianInferenceProvider

All Superinterfaces:
AlgorithmProvider
All Known Implementing Classes:
MulticoreBayesianInferenceProvider, VariableEliminationProvider
public interface BayesianInferenceProvider extends AlgorithmProvider
Service provider interface for Bayesian Inference.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    default String

    query(String target, String targetState, Map<String,String> evidence, List<BayesianInferenceProvider.BayesNodeData> nodes)
    Performs inference on a Bayesian network using Real precision.

    Performs inference on a Bayesian network using double precision.
